variants.name: Dodge Master
variants.flavor_text: Classic obstacle avoidance! Master the art of dodging.

variants.name: Dodge Deluxe
variants.flavor_text: Now with aggressive enemies! Can you handle the heat?

variants.name: Dodge Ice Rink
variants.flavor_text: Slippery! Slow to start, long drift, soft bounces

variants.name: Dodge Pinball
variants.flavor_text: Chaotic bouncing with bouncer enemies!

variants.name: Dodge Slippery Slope
variants.flavor_text: Heavy drift with zigzagging threats

variants.name: Dodge Tiny Arena
variants.flavor_text: Small spaces, big pressure!

variants.name: Dodge Momentum Master
variants.flavor_text: Control your drift while avoiding holes!

variants.name: Dodge Heartbeat
variants.flavor_text: Sync with the pulse or perish

variants.name: Dodge Fighter
variants.flavor_text: Classic space flight with reverse thrusters

variants.name: Dodge Heavy Tank
variants.flavor_text: Slow turning, heavy momentum, soft impacts

variants.name: Dodge Nimble Scout
variants.flavor_text: Fast, agile - high skill ceiling with chasers

variants.name: Dodge Battlecruiser
variants.flavor_text: Heavy ship, heavy firepower against you

variants.name: Dodge Asteroid Belt
variants.flavor_text: Navigate the asteroids with bouncy physics

variants.name: Dodge Space Drifter
variants.flavor_text: Drift through pulsing space - no reverse!

variants.name: Dodge War Zone
variants.flavor_text: Combat maneuvers under heavy fire!

variants.name: Dodge Shapeshifter
variants.flavor_text: Circle, square, hex - adapt your flight!

variants.name: Dodge Tactical Dash
variants.flavor_text: Quick dashes - plan each move carefully!

variants.name: Dodge Blink Warp
variants.flavor_text: Instant teleports - blink across the arena!

variants.name: Dodge Slide Master
variants.flavor_text: Dash and slide - control the drift!

variants.name: Dodge Rocket Jump
variants.flavor_text: Long jumps, strategic planning required

variants.name: Dodge Phase Shift
variants.flavor_text: Teleporters vs your phase shifts!

variants.name: Dodge Ice Dash
variants.flavor_text: Icy slides between hazard holes!

variants.name: Dodge One Strike
variants.flavor_text: Cross the line and it's over

variants.name: Dodge Chaos
variants.flavor_text: Absolute mayhem! All enemy types swarm you!

variants.name: Dodge Hexagonal Havoc
variants.flavor_text: Six sides, four traps, bouncing enemies

variants.name: Dodge Minefield
variants.flavor_text: Navigate the landmines!

variants.name: Dodge Cardinal Drift
variants.flavor_text: Drifting through the four winds

variants.name: Dodge Speed Demon
variants.flavor_text: Blink and you're dead

variants.name: Dodge Square Fortress
variants.flavor_text: Think in right angles under fire

variants.name: Dodge Wobble Zone
variants.flavor_text: The walls are... breathing?

variants.name: Dodge Rapid Pulse
variants.flavor_text: Can you match this tempo?

variants.name: Dodge Gauntlet Run
variants.flavor_text: For masters only - one mistake ends it

variants.name: Dodge Precision Test
variants.flavor_text: Perfection required

variants.name: Dodge Mega Arena
variants.flavor_text: Size won't save you from the mines

variants.name: Dodge Elite Squadron
variants.flavor_text: They teleport AND shoot! Only the elite survive.

variants.name: Dodge Fog Runner
variants.flavor_text: Limited visibility! Survive 45 seconds in the fog

variants.name: Dodge Shield Tank
variants.flavor_text: Big target, regenerating shields! Tank through the chaos

variants.name: Dodge Wind Dancer
variants.flavor_text: Ride the turbulent winds! Speed bonus activated

variants.name: Dodge Bullet Hell Nano
variants.flavor_text: Tiny hitbox, one life, chaos everywhere. Good luck.

variants.name: Dodge Gravity Well
variants.flavor_text: Pulled to the center, obstacles hunt you down

variants.name: Dodge Wave Assault
variants.flavor_text: Enemy waves crash over you! Survive 60 seconds

variants.name: Dodge Cluster Bomb
variants.flavor_text: Groups of varied-size obstacles explode everywhere

variants.name: Dodge Spiral Descent
variants.flavor_text: Spiraling obstacles, outward gravity, limited vision

variants.name: Dodge Arena Pulse
variants.flavor_text: Obstacles pulse from the arena! Stay centered for bonus

variants.name: Dodge Edge Lord
variants.flavor_text: Risk-takers rewarded! Play near the edge for score bonus

variants.name: Dodge Homing Nightmare
variants.flavor_text: Everything hunts you. Triple shields won't be enough.

variants.name: Dodge Speed Trial
variants.flavor_text: 30-second sprint! Speed boost + wind assist

variants.name: Dodge Chaotic Void
variants.flavor_text: Pure chaos. Everything is random. Everything is deadly.

variants.name: Dodge Trail Blazer
variants.flavor_text: Trails everywhere! Navigate the afterimages

variants.name: Dodge Fortress Defense
variants.flavor_text: You're a fortress. Survive 100 dodges with mega shields

variants.name: Dodge Anti-Gravity Surge
variants.flavor_text: Gravity repels you! Wind pushes randomly! Fight the chaos

variants.name: Dodge Perfect Storm
variants.flavor_text: The ultimate test. Waves, wind, tracking, minimal survival

variants.name: Dodge Giant Hunters
variants.flavor_text: Massive slow chasers! Stay ahead of the giants

variants.name: Dodge Size Chaos
variants.flavor_text: Enemies range from tiny to huge! Unpredictable chaos

variants.name: Dodge Speed Roulette
variants.flavor_text: Wildly varying speeds! Some crawl, some lightning fast

variants.name: Dodge Micro Swarm
variants.flavor_text: Tiny fast enemies swarm everywhere!

variants.name: Dodge Spinning Madness
variants.flavor_text: Everything spins! Bouncers fast, zigzags backward, chasers ultra-fast

variants.name: Dodge Locked Facings
variants.flavor_text: Sprites never rotate! Each type locked to different cardinal direction

variants.name: Dodge Dizzy Spin
variants.flavor_text: Teleporters spin 1.5x/sec facing NE, zigzags spin -1x/sec facing SE

variants.name: Dodge Shooter Carousel
variants.flavor_text: Shooters spin while tracking you and firing rapidly

variants.name: Dodge Asteroid Field
variants.flavor_text: Asteroids split into dangerous shards at the safe zone!

variants.name: Dodge Shrapnel Storm
variants.flavor_text: Splitters rain shards while chasers hunt you down

variants.name: MAW
variants.flavor_text: Columns of teeth snap shut. Survive 30 seconds in the MAW.

variants.name: Dodge Escalation
variants.flavor_text: Starts easy. Gets worse. Shooters appear around 15 seconds.

variants.name: Zamboni Panic
variants.flavor_text: Ice rink. You're a skater. Zambonis and hockey players don't care about you.

variants.name: DETENTION
variants.flavor_text: Classroom. Mr. Henderson left. Things are falling from the ceiling.

variants.name: WILL IT BLEND?
variants.flavor_text: You're in a blender. Blades orbit the center. Everything spirals inward.

variants.name: NASAL PASSAGE
variants.flavor_text: Dust mite in a nostril. The breathing cycle IS the game.

variants.name: LEVEL 0
variants.flavor_text: The Backrooms. The carpet is damp. Something is here.

variants.name: FLUSH
variants.flavor_text: Rubber duck in a flushing toilet. Stay afloat.

variants.name: STORM CHASER
variants.flavor_text: Tornado. Stay in the eye. Everything else is in the air.

variants.name: 30 SECONDS
variants.flavor_text: Microwave. Fork is sparking. Don't get zapped.

variants.name: BIG TOP
variants.flavor_text: Circus. Catch 15 balloons. Dodge the clowns.
